docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER VITATOE, CHRISTOPHER JAMES

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-08-2019 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER CHRISTOPHER VITATOE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE, BUT HAS WAIVED PETITIONER'S FIRST APPEARANCE FEE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
